title: Silver Stainless Steel Sink Strainer & Plug, 2 Pieces - Durable & Stylish Design, Ideal for Kitchen, Bathroom, & More
features: SLEEK & STYLISH DESIGN: With a sleek silver finish, this sink strainer and plug set adds a touch of elegance to any sink. Its modern design seamlessly blends with any decor, making it a stylish upgrade for your home.

HIGH-QUALITY CONSTRUCTION: This sink strainer and plug set is crafted from premium stainless steel ensuring durability and longevity. Made to withstand the daily demands of both kitchen and bathroom sinks.

EASY TO INSTALL: No tools or complicated instructions are needed for installation. Simply place the strainer in your sink and insert the plug when needed. Its universal fit design ensures a snug, secure fit in most standard sinks.

PRACTICAL & VERSATILE USE: This 2-piece set is not just limited to kitchen and bathroom sinks. It can also be used in laundry rooms, utility sinks, and even outdoor sinks. Its versatility makes it a practical addition to any household.

EASY TO CLEAN: Maintenance is a breeze with this stainless steel and rubber sink set. Durable materials allow for easy washing, ensuring your sink strainer and plug remain in pristine condition use after use.
description: Product Description DESCRIPTION: Premium quality sink strainer & plug set feature a stainless steel sink strainer and complete with a durable rubber plug. Safety Warning No warning applicable
